Localization.Description: An attempt of a user to log in to the system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} logged in to the Personal Monitor module "{object.name}" on behalf of the user {object.account.name}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to the Personal Monitor module "{object.name}"
The user logged in to the Personal Monitor module "{object.name}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host}
